mapper.sql: id, do_id, warehouse_code, carried, express_code, qty, barCode, package_code, msg_id, modelno, do_type, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, express_child_no
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_do_post
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_do_post (id, do_id, warehouse_code, carried, express_code, qty, barCode, package_code, msg_id, modelno, do_type, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, express_child_no) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packageCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{expressChildNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_do_post
id,
do_id,
warehouse_code,
carried,
express_code,
qty,
barCode,
package_code,
msg_id,
modelno,
do_type,
delflag,

creator,

modifier,
express_child_no,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_do_post
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barCode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
package_code = #{record.packageCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
msg_id = #{record.msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_type = #{record.doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
express_child_no = #{record.expressChildNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_do_post set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, barCode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, package_code = #{record.packageCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, msg_id = #{record.msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_type = #{record.doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, express_child_no = #{record.expressChildNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_do_post
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
barCode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
package_code = #{packageCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
msg_id = #{msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_type = #{doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
express_child_no = #{expressChildNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_do_post set do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, barCode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, package_code = #{packageCode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, msg_id = #{msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_type = #{doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, express_child_no = #{expressChildNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
